mapper.insert: INSERT INTO szzw.t_yqyc_wf_ticket (id, ticket_no, business_id, group_id, ticket_type, ticket_status, submitter_id, current_handler_id, submit_time, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{ticketNo}, #{businessId}, #{groupId}, #{ticketType}, #{ticketStatus}, #{submitterId}, #{currentHandlerId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE szzw.t_yqyc_wf_ticket SET ticket_status = #{status}, current_handler_id = #{handlerId}, finish_time = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('通过','驳回') THEN SYSDATE ELSE finish_time END, updated_time = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{ticketId}
